description_long: This is a rectangular, hard-sided toolbox with a rugged, utilitarian design, featuring a muted blue-gray body and an orange-brown lid. The lid is adorned with a large, central, rectangular handle that appears to be made of sturdy plastic or metal, designed for easy carrying. The front face displays a sticker with a cartoonish image and a set of three green arrows, suggesting either a playful customization or a functional label. The box is marked with various scratches and scuffs, indicating frequent use and durability. The sides and back are plain, with the only notable features being the handle and latch mechanisms. The overall construction suggests a robust container suitable for storing and transporting tools in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or construction sites.
description: A rugged, rectangular toolbox with a blue-gray body, orange-brown lid, central handle, and visible wear marks. Features a sticker and green arrow markings on the front.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main handle, a sticker with a cartoon image, and three green arrows, along with visible latch details and surface scratches.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness of the lid and body, with the handle visible from the side and no additional markings.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain surface with scratches and scuffs, lacking any stickers or labels, and shows the full width of the toolbox.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the first side, showing the handle and the box's depth, with no visible stickers or markings.
attribute_handle_type: Single, rectangular, folding handle made of plastic or metal, centrally mounted on the lid, designed for ergonomic grip and easy carrying.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Two visible clasp latches on the front, likely made of plastic or metal, with no keyholes or combination locks apparent.
attribute_compartment_configuration: No internal compartments are visible; the exterior suggests a single large internal compartment with a hinged lid, typical of standard toolboxes.
attribute_external_labeling: Sticker with cartoon image on front left
Three green arrows on front center
